title: lyonia truncata var. proctorii
intro: Lyonia truncata var. proctorii, also known as the Proctor's Lyonia or Mountain Honeysuckle, is a shrub native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Lyonia truncata var. proctorii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to be used in herbal remedies, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
